flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Husson University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.4k → $23.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Husson University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.4k → $23.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Husson University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Husson University rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (32.8% → 43.9%).
